context: Checks whether the agent knows Stream.toList mutability semantics and investigates all relevant collection contracts before changing implementation.

checklist.name: Root cause is precise
checklist.description: Identifies that Stream.toList returns an unmodifiable list and connects that fact to the failing sort/add operations.

checklist.name: Mutation evidence
checklist.description: Uses the shown downstream mutation and historical public contract as evidence rather than treating mutability as a style opinion.

checklist.name: Smallest remedy
checklist.description: Proposes a local mutable collection result such as an appropriate collector or copy, without changing unrelated pipelines.

checklist.name: Order duplicates and nulls
checklist.description: Explicitly preserves encounter/order behavior, duplicates, and the prior null contract or verifies any implementation-specific difference.

checklist.name: Ownership and API contract
checklist.description: Checks whether returning the internal mutable list and aliasing are intentional public API behavior before adding defensive copies.

checklist.name: Regression coverage
checklist.description: Includes the original sort failure, fallback add, duplicates, empty input, ordering, nulls where legal, and returned-list mutability.

checklist.name: Patch scope
checklist.description: Avoids converting the flow to nested streams or introducing abstractions unrelated to the defect.

checklist.name: Java compatibility
checklist.description: Confirms the project release and does not rely on a newer JDK or invented collector behavior.

checklist.name: Verification gates
checklist.description: Names focused tests plus the repository wrapper compile/test/check or verify commands, and distinguishes commands not yet run.
